subcodes.first_line: O Abul-Fadl! By this blessed and goodly word which, even as the sun, shineth forth from the horizon of the heaven of God's Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالفضل باینکلمه طیبه مبارکه که بمثابه آفتاب از افق سماء لوح الهی مشرقست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech, @being a source of light; guidance
